video_description: The man beat a black dog on the side of the road with his fist.
In the yard where many motorcycles are parked, three men beat a man in a pink shirt with a stick.
The mobile phone in the hands of a sitting man in the house suddenly caught fire and gave out white smoke.
At the gas station, the car behind the woman in the blue shirt burst into flames.
A group of children threw firecrackers into the sewer and exploded, producing huge shock waves and smoke.
There was a small explosion in a restaurant with some smoke.
The far part of the alley suddenly exploded, producing a fireball. The explosion destroyed the surrounding things. Pedestrians and dogs run away.
A bus rushed to the side of the road and crashed a pillar and then stopped.
In the parking lot at night, a man shot at several others.
On the grass, a man in a blue shirt was holding a gun, and many people shot each other and ran.
At night, two car robbers were scared away by a man who opened fire.
A man snatched the gold jewelry from the counter while the two shop assistants were not paying attention, and then ran away.
Two men checkout at the cash register of an electronic supermarket chain, while a red man is selecting products.
A man in glasses and a man in a red hat communicated from time to time and paced back and forth in the room.
At the gate of the office, eight people walked out of the steps, and one entered the office.
On the street, two strong men walked into the store, and an old man with white hair was walking on the street.
At the exit of the supermarket, everyone pushed their shopping carts out of the supermarket with the goods they bought.
At a window in the supermarket, two men in white shirts were buying goods one after the other, and there was a male staff member in the store.
In the office, six men sat around a round table and discussed.
In the bowling alley, several people are playing bowling, and there is a group of spectators below.
In the commodity processing workshop, workers are reprocessing the commodities on the assembly line.
At the gate of the compound, a white van drove out of the compound during the day.
There were three stools in the room, one with a box on it, the other two were empty, and then a man came in.
There were three stools in the room, one with a box on it, the other two were empty, and then a man came in with an empty box in his hand.
During the day, cars move in an orderly manner on the road.
At the cash register of the supermarket, multiple channels are used for cash registering in parallel.
On the streets at night, the roadside was full of cars, and there was a person walking on the crosswalk.
Inside the house, a woman in orange clothes is sitting on a stool with a laptop on her lap.
In a pink room, a woman in blue clothes sits at a table operating a computer.
At the entrance of a shopping mall, people came in and out.
In the daytime, a blue car parked at the door of the house, and a mother and daughter walked into the house.
In the daytime supermarket, a group of four people entered the supermarket to buy goods.
During the day, vehicles pass the traffic light intersection in an orderly manner, and a yellow bus is waiting for the traffic light.
Without a car on the road under the bridge, a person crossed the road on a bicycle.
During the day, there are many cars parked next to the house, and cars pass by on the road.
At night, someone in the computer room went out with goods.
A woman in white clothes got on the bus, and the bus drove slowly.
In the shop, a man in white is walking, and a man sits at a table calling and playing on a computer.
On the road, the students are in a relay race, sometimes cars pass by, and someone sits on the sidewalk to warm up.
